description: LingoPeak Complete Vocabulary Database - All 6 Languages

courseOutline.description: Learn basic greetings, how to introduce yourself, and common polite phrases
Master numbers from 0-100, telling time, and basic quantities
Learn family member names and basic relationship vocabulary
Explore food vocabulary, restaurant phrases, and meal-related terms
Learn travel vocabulary, directions, and transportation methods
Master shopping phrases, currency, and basic transactions
Learn verbs and vocabulary for everyday activities
Understand weather conditions and seasonal vocabulary
Explore sports, games, and leisure activities
Learn about Spanish-speaking cultures and traditions
